description_long: This object is a sleek, all-black combat or utility knife with a straight, double-edged blade and a pointed tip, designed for piercing and thrusting. The blade is long and tapers evenly to a sharp point, with no visible serrations or decorative features. The handle is cylindrical and ergonomically contoured, featuring a ribbed or textured grip for secure handling, and ends in a rounded pommel. A simple, straight crossguard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The entire object appears to be constructed from a single material, likely a matte-finished metal or high-strength polymer, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. There are no visible markings, engravings, or ornamentation, and no sheath is present.
description: A modern, all-black double-edged knife with a straight blade, ribbed ergonomic handle, and simple crossguard. The design is sleek, functional, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade and the ribbed handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, displaying the blade and handle profile.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the blade's thinness and the handle's symmetry.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, ribbed, ergonomic, black polymer or metal, rounded pommel
